name: v05-admin-delete-user
description: Admin-only endpoint demonstrating a full authn+authz middleware chain at the workflow level. `jwt-auth` verifies the bearer token and stashes identity at ctx.state.identity; `admin-only` then asserts the JWT's `role` claim equals `admin` (else 403); only then does the handler step run. The handler simulates a destructive operation (DELETE user) by POSTing to httpbin so end-to-end tests can curl the failure-response shape without persistence. The same chain composes onto any sensitive endpoint with one line — that's the v0.5.2 win. Replace `jwt-auth` with your provider's JWKS in production by setting JWT_JWKS_URI; the `role` check stays unchanged.

inputs.expression: ({ ok: true, action: 'delete-user', targetUserId: ctx.request.body.userId, deletedBy: ctx.state.identity.sub })
